# Contributing

Thanks for helping improve Numorph.

## Local Setup

```sh
npm install
npm run typecheck
npm test
npm run test:browser
npm run build
```

## Development

Run the playground:

```sh
npm run dev
```

Open the printed local URL and use the Numorph and NumberFlow examples to compare behavior.

## Before Opening A Pull Request

Please run:

```sh
npm run check
```

Keep changes focused. For animation behavior changes, include a short note about the user-visible effect and any tradeoffs.
